COURT TRIAL

Motion For Court Ordered Physical Examination
Off Calendar Apr-11-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Judy Cornels Love for defendant and moving party: Bradley Connlain
Brian L. Larsen for Plaintiff and opposing party: AFI Shepard-Staley
HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion for a second physical examination of plaintiff is granted. The examination is to be conducted by Dr. John Misserian M.D. and is to be completed by April 22, 2005. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to a mutually convenient date, time and location for the examination. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. With April 29, 2005 COMPLIANCE DATE. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
